title: SERCHHIP BAWRHSAP HOVIN SERCHHIP DISTRICT CHHUNGA NATIONAL HIGHWAY DINHMUN THLIR HONA NEIH A NI
content:
942/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 10thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin sawrkar laipuiin National Highway siam nana ram a lo lak tawhte leh kawng dinhmunte sawi hona DC Meeting Hall-ah neih a ni.

Meeting-ah hian National Highway siam nan sawrkar laipui Ministry of Road Transport & Highways kaltlanga President of India hminga ram lak tawh te, a ram hmun leh a zau zawng chhinchhiahna record fel taka siam a, Land Revenue & Settlement record-a ram neitu hming thlak fel dan turte sawi ho niin ram neitu dik tak ten an chanvo an hmuh theihna tur leh nakin zela inhnialna pumpelhna atan, Revenue Department leh NHIDCL ten a rang lama an chin fel dan turte rel niin, Fur ruahtui tlak avanga kawng chhe mai theite leh siam that hna chak taka thawh a nih theih nana hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte rel a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan contractor-te chu hna tha taka thawk a, ruahmanna anga hun tiam chhunga zo ngei tura tan la turin a chah a. Mipui tana kawng him leh tha siam chu sawrkarin a ngaih pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

He meeting-ah hian Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Dorothy Muansangi, Assistant Commissioner (Revenue) Pu Gaston Vanlalhriatpuia, NHIDCL Manager leh hotu dangte bakah Contractor leh sawrkar mi pawimawh dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DC Office and Disha Foundation Launch English Language Foundation (ELF) 2.0
content:
159/2026-2027

Lunglei, 10 June 2026 :The second phase of the English Language Foundation (ELF) 2.0, a collaborative initiative of the Deputy Commissioner's Office, Lunglei, and Disha Foundation, was formally launched today to strengthen foundational English language skills among primary school students in the district.

The programme was inaugurated by Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei, Pi Navneet Mann, at her office chamber. Speaking on the occasion, she noted the successful implementation of the first phase of ELF in the Lungsen Aspirational Block and expressed satisfaction that the initiative is now being expanded to more schools across the district. She appreciated the continued support and commitment of Disha Foundation and urged officials of the Education Department, Officers-in-Charge and the teachers of participating schools to put forth their best efforts to ensure the success of the programme and maximise its benefits for the students.

The inaugural programme was chaired by Sub-Deputy Commissioner, Lunglei Pi Lalnunchhani Hnamte. District Education Officer Pu Micky R. Lalenkawla delivered a motivational address, while representatives from Disha Foundation presented an overview of the implementation plan for ELF 2.0.

Following the inauguration, an orientation training session was conducted for the participating teachers. The Disha Foundation team provided training on various key aspects of the programme, followed by an interactive session for discussions and clarifications.

ELF 2.0 will be implemented in ten selected government primary schools across Lunglei District, covering a total of 468 students. The selected schools are :

Lungsen Aspirational Block: Lungsen-I, Lungsen-II, Chhumkhum, Phairuangkai, Tuisenchhuah and Zawlpui Government Primary Schools;

Lunglei Municipal Council Area: Electric Veng-I and Rahsiveng-II Government Primary Schools;

Bunghmun Block: Bunghmun-I Government Primary School; and

Tlabung Block: Tlabung-I Government Primary School.

Under the programme, Disha Foundation will provide both on-site and online training to teachers. They will also supply a range of learning materials, including teaching aids, workbooks and instructional videos, which teachers will use in classroom instruction. Student training is scheduled to commence after the First Term Examination of the 2026–2027 academic session, with periodic assessments to monitor and evaluate learning progress.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DC Office leh Disha Foundation ṭang kawp huaihawta Lunglei District-a English Language Foundation (ELF) 2.0 kalpui tur hawn a ni
content:
941/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 10 :Lunglei District-a primary sikul zirlaite'n English bulṭhut thiamna kawnga hma an sawn theihna tura Lunglei Deputy Commissioner (Bawrhsap) office leh Disha Foundation te ṭang kawpin a thawh hnihna atana English Language Foundation (ELF) 2.0 an ruahman chu vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan a hna thawh pindanah a hawng.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Lungsen Aspirational Block-a primary school sawmah ELF thawh khatna hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih tawh thu sawiin, Lunglei District chhung sikul danga ELF thawh hnihna kalpui chhunzawm theih a ni tur chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. ELF hlawhtlinna tura kawng hrang hranga thawhpuitu Disha Foundation chungah lawm thu sawiin, Education Department-a thawktute, Officer incharge-te leh ELF 2.0 kalpuina tur sikul zirtirtute chu programme hlawhtlinna tur leh zirlaite'n an sawtpui theihna tura theih tawp chhuah ṭheuh turin a chah.

ELF 2.0 hawnna hun hi Lunglei Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pi Lalnunchhani Hnamte chuan a kaihruai a. District Education Officer Pu Micky R. Lalenkawla'n lawm thu leh fuihna thu sawiin, Disha Foundation aṭangin ELF 2.0 kalpui dan tur ruahmanna ngaihthlak a ni.

Hawnna hun hman zawh hian orientation training buatsaih zui niin, Disha Foundation Team te'n zirtirtute tana hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang an zirtir a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun hman a ni bawk.

ELF 2.0 hi Lunglei District chhunga sawrkar primary sikul thlan bik sawmah kalpui tura ruahman a ni a. Lungsen Aspirational Block-ah sikul 6 – Lungsen-I, Lungsen-II, Chhumkhum, Phairuangkai, Tuisenchhuah leh Zawlpui Government Primary School (GPS)-te; Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) huam chhungah sikul 2 – Electric Veng-I leh Rahsiveng-II GPS-te; Bunghmun Block-ah Bunghmun-I GPS leh Tlabung Block-ah Tlabung-I GPS te thlan chhuah an ni a. He'ng sikulah te hian belh khawmin zirlai 468 an awm.

Ruahman lawk dan chuan, ELF 2.0 kalpui turah hian Disha Foundation lam aṭangin zirtirtute hi a hmunah leh online kal tlangin training pek an ni ang a. Disha Foundation aṭangin zirna hmanraw chi hrang hrang – teaching aids, workbook leh video te rawn thawnin, chumi hmang chuan zirtirtute'n an sikulah ṭheuh an zirlaite an zirtir zui dawn a. Kum 2026–2027 session first term exam zawh aṭangin zirlaite training hi kalpui ṭan tur niin, zirlaite hmasawn dan finfiahna turin a khat tawkin test buatsaih ṭhin a ni bawk ang.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT TASK FORCE AND COMMITTEE FOR  MALARIA ELIMINATION THUKHAWM
content:
940/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 PM khan Deputy Commissioner's Conference Hall, Lawngtlaiah Bawrhsap leh Chairman, District Task Force and Committee for Malaria Elimination- ni bawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin thutkhawm neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a . Lawngtlai district- chu a zauin International Border- hnaih khua a tam bawk avangin harsatna neuh neuh a tam thin hle tih tarlangin hei vang hian Medical lama thawktute pawh an zual sauh a ngai a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan thawktute hmalakna neihah ang angte fakawm a tiin an chungah lawmthu a sawi a. July thlaah Malaria a hluar nasa thin hle a, hemi a nih avang hian June thla atanga ruahmanna felfai tak siam thiam a tul hle a ti. India ram pumpuiah June thla chu 'Anti Malaria Month' ah puan thin a nih angin Lawngtlai District- ah pawh chak taka hmalak a tul hle tih a tarlang. Lawngtlai District- atanga Malaria hrik umbo turin sawrkarin theihtawp a chhuah dawn tih tarlangin, mipuite pawh sawrkar thuchhuak zawm bakah mahni theuh lo fimkhur leh invenghim turin a chah nghal bawk.

He hunah hian Dr. Remlalnghaki, Dy.CMO pawhin thutawi sawiin Malaria laka invenna tur atan IRS kah leh Delmethrine- a thosilen chiah leh sem ah te tan lak mek a nih thu a tarlang a. Malaria avanga thihna thlen chhanber pakhat chu thisen lak tir lo a, mahni a tuar mai thin an la tam bakah inenkawlna ngaihthat thin vang a nih thu sawiin, a hma lama thisen endik leh a tul anga inenkawl turin mipuite a sawm a ni. Pu C Khaipotha, District Consultant, Vector Borne Disease Control Programme- chuan Malaria chungchangah report- a pe bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Task Force and Committee for  Malaria Elimination, Member- te an kal tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS REVIEW MEETING WITH THREE OUTSKIRT BLOs OF LAWNGTLAI TOWN
content:
158/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 10 June 2026 :As part of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, the District Election Officer (DEO), Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, convened a review meeting with three Booth Level Officers (BLOs) from the outskirts of Lawngtlai Town at the DC's Office Chamber at 3:00 PM today.

During the meeting, the DEO appreciated the dedication and commendable efforts of the BLOs in carrying out SIR 2026 activities. He, however, pointed out that there is still scope for improvement in the collection of Enumeration Forms and in the digitization process. In this regard, the BLOs of Saizawh East, Kakichhuah and Runkual were urged to intensify their efforts and work with greater commitment.

He also stressed the need to strengthen Electors Mapping activities and encouraged the BLOs to continue working diligently. Emphasizing the importance attached to SIR 2026 by the Election Commission of India (ECI), he stated that it is essential to carry forward the revision exercise in line with the Commission’s expectations and urged the BLOs to discharge their responsibilities efficiently and sincerely.

The review meeting was attended by the Election Officer, Lawngtlai; the Block Development Officer (BDO), RD Block Lawngtlai, who is also the Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO); and the three BLOs from the town outskirts. The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by the DEO, Donny Lalruatsanga.

Attachment

title: Sport and Youth Services Minister-in ONE Championship Winner leh Contract hlawh chhuaktu Nazareth Lalthazuala lawmpui
content:
939/2026-2027Dated Aizawl, the 10th June, 2026 :Sport and Youth Services (SYS) Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan vawiin khan a Pisa-ah ONE Championship Winner leh contract hlawh chhuaktu Nazareth Lalthazuala lawmpuina hun a hmang.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Nazareth Lalthazuala chu a lawmpui takzet thu sawiin, a hlawhtlinna chuan mawhphurna lian tak a kentel thu leh Mizo naupangte fuihtu leh ti phurtu tur a nih thu a sawi a. Tunah chuan ‘professional’ a nih tawh avangin a kutah mawhphurhna leh chona lian zawk hmachhawn tur a awm tih sawiin, world champion ni thei turin tun aia nasa zawka tan la turin a fuih a ni.

Minister chuan Empowering Mizoram Youth chungchang pawh sawiin, kum 2036 Olympic Games-a Mizote kan tel ve ngei theih nan infiamna thlan bik pariatah insawrbinga hmalakna kalpui mek a ni, a ti. Combat sports zawng zawngte training-na tur hmunhma tha bik, ‘Boxing Centre of Excellence’ din turin NESIDS-OTRI (North East Special Infrastructure Development Scheme - Other than Roads Infrastructure), Ministry of DoNER hnuaiah Rs. 38,39,94,251.47 senga hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Thusawitu dang Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua, MLA chuan Nazareth Lalthazuala chu nakin zel atan a chetsual loh nan agent thlan chungchangah fimkhur tur leh mahni hmakhua ngai tak chunga ngaihtuahna fim tak seng turin a fuih a. Mizote tihmingthatu nih a tum zel chuan a kal sual ngai dawn loh thu a sawi bawk.

SYS Director Pu H. Lalhmingthanga chuan SYS-in infiammite tan theihtawp a chhuah thin thu sawiin, an hlawhtlin leh hlawhtlin loh chu infiammite kutah thui tak a innghah thu a sawi a. Nazareth Lalthazuala chu khawvel huapa Mizote hming titha zel turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Nazareth Lalthazuala chuan Minister nen an inbiak pawh reng thu leh amah a ngaihtuah thinna zawng zawngah lawmthu a sawi a. Mizoram State Mixed Martial Arts Association (MISMA) hnenah pawh lawmthu sawiin, MISMA chu Sawrkar recognise turin a ngen a ni.

He hunah hian MISMA aiawhin Pu Samuel Lalrozama, MISMA Secretary pawhin thu a sawi bawk.

Nazareth Lalthazuala hi Phuaibuang khaw chhuak niin tunah hian Zemabawk East-ah a cheng mek a, a professional record-ah vawi riat chak tawhin vawi khat mah a la tlawm lo a ni. ONE Championship-a a sulhnu chu hetiang a ni:

1) ONE Friday Fights 157 (June 5) ah Philippines fighter Jhon Brutus a hneh.

2) ONE Friday Fights 144 (February 27) ah Philippines fighter Jake Bron a hneh.

3) ONE Friday Fights 135 (November 28) ah Japanese fighter Masaki Suzuki a hneh (December ni 5, 2026 ah Sports Minister-in lawmpuina hun a hmang a ni).

A record dangte:

1) Bronze medal (Wushu), National Games 2025

2) National MMA champion vawi 3

3) MISMA Mizoram State MMA Champion vawi 3

4) Mizoram Fight League Flyweight Champion

A lawmpuina programme-ah hian Adviser to CM Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA; MISMA Honorary President Lt Col Clement Lalhmingthanga, MLA; Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua, MLA; Pu V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, Sports and Youth Services Department, official pawimawh dangte leh MISMA hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER - IN LAWNGTLAI TOWN PAWN BLO- PATHUM TE MEETING NEIHPUI
content:
938/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 10th June 2026 :SIR 2026 kalpui mek zelah vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 khan Lawngtlai District Election Officer, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan DC's Office Chamber-ah Lawngtlai khawpui pawna BLO- 3(Pathum) te Meeting an neihpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan SIR 2026 kalpui mekah BLO - te inpekna leh hnathawh fakawm a tih thu sawiin, chutih rualin Enumeration Forms lakkhawm leh Digitization - lamah hmasawnna tur a awm tih a tarlang a. Hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hnathawk turin- Saizawh East, Kakichhuah leh Runkual BLO pathumte a chah a ni. Electors Mapping - bikah tun aia tan lak nasat a tul tih sawiin, BLO- te thahnemngai taka thawk turin a chah a ni. DEO chuan Election Commission of India (ECI) in SIR 2026 - a ngaipawimawh hle tih hriaa, ECI beisei ang taka hnathawh chhunzawm zel a tul hle tih sawiin, BLO - te an mawhphurhna tha taka hlen turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin Review Meeting- ah hian Election Officer, Lawngtlai, BDO, RD Block Lawngtlai leh AERO ni bawk leh  khaw pawn BLO- pathum te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT-A BANK HRANG HRANGTE DINHMUN THLIRLETNA LEH HMA LAK ZEL DAN TURTE SAWI HONA DCC/DLRC/DLSC MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
937/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 10thJune 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip-ah District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaiin December 2025 & March 2026 Quarter tawpa Serchhip District chhunga Bank hrang hrangte dinhmun thlirletna leh sawi hona DC Meeting Hall-ah neih a ni. Lead District Manager Pu Lalnghawrliana leh Serchhipa Bank hrang hranga Branch Manager-te bakah sawrkar department hotute an tel a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Govt. Sponsored Scheme hrang hrang NRLM, NULM, PMEGP, SUI, PMMY, KCC leh Social Welfare Scheme – PMJJBY, PMSBY leh APY etc. hnuaia hmalaknate leh Bank hrang hrangte thawh that dan (performance) report- te en ho niin, tan lak ngaihna laite sawi ho a ni a. Govt. Schemes kalpui thin sawrkar department hrang hrangte leh bank te inkara thawh hona tha zawk a awm theih dan turte leh Financial Literacy Camp - sum leh pai enkawl dan leh bank kaltlanga sum khawl leh peipun dan inzirtirna buatsaih chungchangte sawi ho a ni bawk a. Bank branch hrang hrangte him lehzualna atana Police ten an tlawh/vil dan tur te, loan rulh that loh awm thin (NPA) tih tlem dan tur te, Community Based Recovery Mechanism (CBRM) mumal zawka kalpui dan tur te, mobile/computer kaltlanga dan bawhchhiatna (Cyber Crime/Fraud) awm thei laka inven dan leh thil tisualtute hrem dan tur chungchangte sawi ho a ni bawk.

March 2026 quarter tawp, ni 31.03.2026 thlenga Serchhip District-a Bank-a pawisa dahluh tawh zawng zawng tlingkhawm chu cheng nuai 63250.18 a ni a, Bank-in loan a pekchhuah tawh chu cheng nuai 44544.22 niin, Credit Deposit Ratio (CD Ratio) chu 70.43% a ni a (CD Ratio hi Bank-in mipui pawisa a khawl atanga loan a pekchhuah zat tehna a ni), hei hian District chhungah sum che vel a ṭha tih entir a ni. Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY) hnuaiah March 2026 quarter tawp chhungin mi 326 hnenah Rs. 1163.41 lakh semchhuah a ni. National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM) hnuaiah Self Help Group (SHG) 128 hnenah Rs. 612.95 lakh pek a ni a, Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) hnuaiah District chhungah bank account 22,813 hawn tawh a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL POLICE-TE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
935/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 10th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Khawzawl District SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva chuan SDPO Khawzawl leh Khawzawl Police Station Staff-te tana buatsaihni 2 awh tur Police Portals leh Police Station work management chungchang inzirtirna ‘In-Service Training’ chu Khawzawl Police Station-ah a hawng.In-Service Training hawnnaah hian SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva chuan thu sawiin khawvel changkang chho zelah police-te hnathawhna kawng hrang hrangah tunlai thiamna thar ber ber hmangin, Portal chi hrang hrang an nei tawh a, heng police portal-te hi a nihna tur ang tak leh tangkai zawka hman a nih theihna turin police-te pawh anmahni an in tuaithar reng a tul tih a sawi a. Thubuai kaihhnawiha Court-in Witness thlenga a kohnate pawh Portal kaltlangin Online in kalpui vek a ni tawh dawn a, chuvangin police-te pawhin digital portal hrang hrangte kalphung an hriatchian a ngai a ni a ti.Training-ah hian Khawzawl SDPO Pu Jeremia Vanlalhmachhuana, OC, Inspector Pi T. Lalnuntluangi leh Sherista S.I C. Pu Biakthianghlima ten training an pe a, mi 20 vel an tel a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN 4TH NATIONAL ARM WRESTLING & PARA ARM WRESTLING CHAMPIONSHIP 2026 A LAWNGTLAI ATANGA KAL MEDAL HAWNTE THINGPUI INPUI
content:
934/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:30 PM khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Chairman, District Sports Committee leh District Bawrhsap nibawk chuan tunhnaia 4th National Arm Wrestling &vPara Arm Wrestling Championship 2026 Rashtriya Raksha University, Gujarata neih zawh taka Mizoram aiawha kal Lawngtlaia Medal rawn hawnte thingpui a inpui.

Bawrhsap & Chairman, District Sports Committee ni bawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan, Lawngtlai District mai ni lo, Mizoram tana medal an rawn hawn thei chu chhuanawm a tih thu tarlangin an hlawhtlinnaah thinlung taka a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Arm Wrestling Association - chu Lawngtlaiah pawl naupangte angin lang mahse, National level thlenga Medal an rawn hawn thei thin chu player - te bakah hruaitute inpekna leh thawhrimna a ni, a ti a. Player - te chu tun aia dinhmun sang zawk thleng thei turin theihna an nei tih hriaa, hlawhtlinna sang zawk chang ngei turin theihtawp in chhuah zel turin a fuih bawk.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan sawrkar official- lam atanga intanpui theihna zawnah theihtawp chhuah zel a nih tur thu a sawi a. Chumi piah lamah pawh hruaitute pawhin mawhphurhna hriaa, theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel a tul hle a ti. Bawrhsap chuan an kal leh zelna turah duhsakna sang ber hlanin, Lawngtlai District atanga Medal rawn hawntute hnenah lawmpuina Rs 5,000 theuh hlan an nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Mizoram aiawh fehchhuak Lawngtlai District atanga Medal rawn hawntute hi Vanlalduata Senior Mens (75 kgs) Bronze Medlist, T.Lalchhuanpuia, Seniors Mens (55 kg) Gold medalist leh Joshua C.Lalrindika, Para Youth Boys (65+ kg) Gold Medalist -te an ni a.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Lawngtlai District Sports Committee Sr.Vice President Pu Elvis Lalthangzuala pawhin thusawiin, infiammite'n hlawhtlinna an chan theihna tura hruaitute inpekna ropui a tih thu a tarlang a. Player - te chu an inpekna leh thawhrimnate Medal hmanga ti lang chhunzawm zel turin a chah bawk a ni.

Vawiin a 4th National Arm Wrestling & Para Arm Wrestling Championship 2026 Rashtriya Raksha University, Gujarata neih zawh taka District Sports Committee Chairman Pu Donny Lalruatsanga'n lawmpuina hun a hmanpui naah hian District Sports Committee - hruaitute bakah Arm Wrestling Association Lawngtlai District hruaitete pawh an tel a ni.

title: SPEAKER PU LALBIAKZAMA’N SAITUAL-AH ZIRLAI TIṬHA TE CHAWIMAWINA HUN A HMANPUI
content:
933/2026-2027

June ni 10, 2026:Vawiinah khan Mizoram Assembly Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama chuan Govt. Saitual College Auditorium-a Saitual District chhunga Zirlai Titha Chawimawina hun Saitual MZP Hqrs.-in buatsaih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Speaker chuan thu sawiin, Mizote chu lehkha zir uar mi, India ramah pawh ziak leh chhiar thiam tamna a pakhatna hial ni thei kan nih avangin chu hmingthatna chu vawng nung zel a pawimawh tiin zirlai kalkhawmte a fuih a. Nu leh paten neihthinglungkhawngin School leh College-ah lehkha an fate an zirtir a, lawmthu sawi let ve theihna chu tha taka lehkha zir a, hlawhtlinna chang a, anmahni chawimawi let ve hi a ni, a ti.

Zirlaite tan tum dahsan a tul thu sawiin Pu Lalbiakzama chuan kum 1966 atanga 1990 vela kumtinin competitive exam-ah IAS tling Mizo pahnih/pathum an lang ziah thin thu leh "There is only one factory in Mizoram : that is IAS factory" tia Mizoram chu sawi a nih thin thu a sawi a. All India leh Central Service lama Mizo thalai tam zawk an tling tura a duh thu sawiin, vawiin a zirlai kalkhawmte chu an tum tisang a, hlawhtlinna sang zawk chang turin ngawrh taka zir chhunzawm zel turin a chah a ni. Chutihrual chuan zirlai zawng zawng IAS kan ni vek theih dawn lo avangin kan kawng theuha kan hlawhtlin theih nan heng - mahni inhriat chian, tuina zawng hriat, rilru puthmang dik, midang biakrawn tam, hmanhmawh loh leh ruahmanna tha neih a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti bawk. Zirna a ni emaw, kut hnathawh pawh ni se; thawhrimna, tumruhna leh teirei peihna tel lo chuan eng kawngah mah a hlawhtlin theih loh tih sawiin Speaker chuan chutiang mi ni tur chuan zirlai kalkhawmte a fuihin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk.

Zirlai tithate chawimawina hunah hian Pu R. Vanlalfaka, SDC, Siatual District pasehin thu a sawi a. Hun hi MZP Hqrs Saitual President Pu Henry V.L. Nunpuia chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Attachment

title: SEIZURE OF CONTRABAND ITEMS
content:
157/2026-2027

Aizawl the 10th June, 2026:

1. On 09.06.2026, one vehicle KIA bearing Registration No. UP32NZ6396 was intercepted by Saitual Police team at the outskirts of Keifang, driven by Somraj (32), S/o Ramrakh Ram, and proceeding from Manipur towards Aizawl. On checking of the vehicle, 71 packets of suspected opium fluid were recovered which was concealed inside the vehicle. The contraband was recovered and seized from the possession of:

The contraband weighed 45.871 Kgs, having an estimated illicit market value of approximately ₹2.29 Crores. Saitual PS Case/No.57/2026 Dt.09.06.2026 u/s 18(b)/25/29 ND&PS Act was registered and further investigation is underway.

2. On 08.06.2026, Champhai Police on duty at Khankawn Check Gate halted one vehicle proceeding from Champhai towards Aizawl for routine checking. During the inspection, one passenger, identified as Vanlalnghaka (36 years) of Tualcheng, presently residing at Vengsang, Champhai District, aroused suspicion of carrying contraband substances in his belongings.

Accordingly, a thorough search of his black rucksack was conducted. A pair of red- coloured Reebok shoes was found inside the bag. Upon closer examination, 2 soap cases of suspected Heroin, weighing 29 grams with an estimated market value of approximately ₹5,80,000, concealed within the shoes were recovered and seized. Champhai PS C/No. 92/26 dt. 08/06/26 u/s 21(b) NDPS Act was registered.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL DISTRICT SKILL COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
932/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah District Skill Committee te chu an Chairman, Deputy Commissioner ni bawk Pu K. Vanlalthiana hoin Rural Self Employment Training Institutes (RSETIS) leh Skill development leh entrepreneurship programme-te chak zawka hmalak  chungchangah an thukhawm.

He thutkhawm ah hian District-in a mamawh tak Rural Self Employment Training Institutes (RSETIS) chu din ve ngei theih nise tih niin, din a nih theih nana hmalak dan turte sawiho a ni a. Neih a nih theihna tura thil tul hrang hrangte lo bawh zuia hma lo la turin mawhphurhna hrang hrang in pek a ni.

title: Siaha RD Block buatsaih Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (VB-G RAM G) inhrilhhriatna hun hman a ni
content:
931/2026-2027

Siaha, 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dár 1 khan DRDO Conference Hall Siaha-ah Siaha RD Block hnuaia Siaha khawpui chhung Village Council member leh line department-te pualin MGNREGA thlakna Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (VB-G RAM G) inhrilhhriatna hun hman a ni a, District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte chuan thu sawiin MGNREGS thlakna tur scheme thar VB-G RAM G hi July ni 1 aṭangin hman ṭan a ni dâwn tih sawiin, sawrkarin ruahmanna (scheme) thar a siam hnuaiah inkaihhruaina fel tâk (guideline) duan ṭhin a ni a, chumi mila hna thawhthiam a, insiamrem thiam a pawimawh a ti. Mipuite leh VC te pawh tih dan ṭhin sahuai thingvawn tlat lo tur leh ruahmanna thar a awm anih chuan chumi mila kal mai chu a ṭhat thu a sawi bawk. Harsatna an tawk anih pawhin enkawltu department hriatpui loha lo herrem tawp lo tur leh Department hnenah rawtna thlen nachang hriaa râwn ṭhin turin a chah.

Pu M. Misael, PD, DRDO, Siaha District chuan Viksit Bharat 2047 hawi zawngin ruahmanna tam tak siam a ni a, VB-G RAM G pawh hi chumi mila herrem zel chu niin kum khat chhungin ni 125 inhlawh theih a ni dâwn a, tun dinhmunah ni khatah ₹281 an hlawh tur thu a sawi. Scheme thar a awm reng rêngin mipuite hnena hriattirna/zirtirna neih hi tih mamawh a ni a, Siaha RD Block in a nachang an hria hi an fakawm a, State level ah neih a ni tawh a, District leh village level ah neih chhunzawm zêl tum anih thu a sawi bawk. VB G RAM G ah chuan sawrkar laipui leh Mizoram sawrkar intum sem tur hi 90:10 a ni dâwn. Mizoram sawrkar  in sum leh pai a do letna a nasa tawh dâwn a, chuvangin hna quality ṭha an duh dâwn a, thikthu pawh an pek chhiat a rinawm thu sawiin mipuite leh VC te pawh a ṭha thei ang berin mi thiam zawkin min duansak anga hna thawk tûrin a chah.

Pi C. Galilee, APO, MGNREGA, Siaha RD Block chuan VB-G RAM G chungchang presentation a nei a, zawhna chhanna leh sawihona hun hman a ni. Pu K. Lalramdinmawia'n Supreme Court thuchhuak anga bawlhhlawh sawngbawl tura thupek 'Solid Waste Management Rules 2026' chungchang zirtirna a nei bawk.

Vawiin hun hman hi BDO Pi Zorinsangin a kaihruai a. Lawmthu sawina neih hnuin hun hman tih tawp a ni.

Attachment

title: RUIHHLO MAN A NI
content:
930/2026-2027

Aizawl the 10th June, 2026:

1. Ni 09.06.2026 khan Saitual Police team-te chuan Keifang khaw daiah lirthei pakhat (Regn. No. UP32NZ6396), Manipur aṭanga Aizawl pan, Somraj (32) s/o Ramrakh Ram khalh chu an lo tiding a. Lirthei hi uluk taka enfiah a nih hnuah, a chhunga thuhruk, opium fluid ni ngeia hriat bawm 71 lai hmuhchhuah a ni. Heng ruihlo te hi a hnuaia mite kut atang hian man a ni:

₹ 2.29 zet man hu a chhut a ni. Saitual PS Case/No.57/2026 Dt.09.06.2026 u/s18(b)/25/29 ND&PS Act tlawhchhanin thubuai ziah luh a ni a, chhui zui hna kalpui mek a ni.

2. Ni 08.06.2026 khan Champhai Police Khankawn Check Gate-a duty-te chuan Champhai aṭanga Aizawl pana tlan lirthei pakhat chu tidingin an enfiah a. He lirthei passenger pakhat Vanlalnghaka (kum 36), Tualcheng khua, tuna Vengsang, Champhai District-a khawsa mek chu a bungruah ruihlo phur nia rinhlelh a niin, a bag dum (black rucksack) chu uluk taka dap a ni a, he bag chhunga Reebok pheikhawk sen chhunga thuhruk chuan Heroin ni ngeia hriat hawng 2 thuhruk chu hmuhchhuah a ni.

He ruihlo hi a rih zawng gram 29 grams a niin, tualchhung hralhna rate-ah ₹5,80,000 zet man tura chhut a ni. He thil thleng chungchangah hian Champhai PS C/No. 92/26 dt. 08/06/26 u/s 21(b) NDPS Act tlawhchhanin thubuai ziah luh a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Board Meeting neih a ni
content:
929/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 10 June 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. Board of Directors Meeting chu Pu Lalnunsanga, Chairman, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. kaihhruaiin Head Office-ah an thukhawm.

Board Meeting-ah hian Bank inrelbawlna hrang hrangte thlirhona leh Apex Bank-in Policy thar a duan te chu pawm a ni a. Reserve Bank of India atanga Pu A. Lallungmuana, Chief Executive Officer atana ruat remtihna lehkha an dawn chu Board Meeting chuan lungrual takin an pawm nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiina Board Meeting hian Loan dilna 108 pek a remti a. Heng loan dilna hrang hrangte hi mimal leh pawl atanga lut Agriculture loan te, Sumdawnna, Banakaih (Handholding) leh Biak In sakna loan-te an ni a. Loan hrang hrang zat belh khawm hi a vaiin cheng vaibelchhe 25.56 a ni.

Tun dinhmuna Apex Bank hian Branch 35 neiin Bank sum dinhmun hi;- deposit cheng vaibelchhe 1928 niin Loan pek chhuah zat belh khawm chu cheng vaibelchhe 1281 lai a ni a. Sum kawl zat atanga Loan pekchhuah zah tehfung CD Ratio hi zaa 66.50% lai a tling a ni.

Attachment

title: NO OFFICIAL VEHICLE DAY A SORKAR HNATHAWK TE TANA BUS SERVICE TITAWP
content:
928/2026-2027

Aizawl the 10th June, 2026:Transport Department chuan June ni 1, 2026 a No Official Vehicle Day a sawrkar hnathawkte office kal lam leh haw lamin an hman theih tura MST Bus Service ruahmanna a lo siam tawh chu hmangtu (passengers) an awmloh avangin sut leh a ni.

Nilaini (Wednesday) tin hi sawrkar lirthei tlanchhuah loh ni "No Official Vehicle Day" a hman mek a ni.

title: KOLASIB-AH VB-G RAM G CHUNGCHANGAH DISTRICT LEVEL ORIENTATION WORKSHOP NEIH A NI
content:
927/2026-2027

Kolasib, 10th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib Bawrhsap leh District Programme Coordinator (VB-G RAM G) ni bawk, Pu H. Dolianbuaia kaihhruaiin ni 125 inhlawhna thar, Viksit Bharat - Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin) - 'VB-G RAM G' chungchangah District Level Orientation Workshop neih a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, Mizoram mipui za zela 70 te chu thingtlanga cheng kan nih thu a tarlang a. Sawrkar laipuiin thingtlang mipuite tana inhlawhna tur 'VB-G RAM G' a rawn duang chhuak hi a vanneihthlak hle a ni, a ti. "India ramin zalenna a hmuh atanga kum 100 a tlinna tur, kum 2047 hma ngeia ram changkang (developed nation) kan nih theih nan sawrkar laipuiin hma nasa takin a la mek a. Khawpui leh thingtlangah hmasawnna rualkhai tak kan neih theih nana scheme tha tak mai, khawvela scheme lian ber ni bawk 'VB-G RAM G' kan hmang tur hi a lawmawm takzet a ni," a ti.

DC chuan, he mission-in a tum ber leh a ruahmannate thingtlang mipuite hnena a taka a thlen theih nan, line department-te chu hrui khat vuana tangtlanga, theih chin chinah thawhho uar turin a chah a ni.

He hunah hian Pu Lalmuan puia, Project Director, DRDO Kolasib pawhin thu sawiin, lo awm tur July ni 1-a hman tan tur 'VB-G RAM G' chu ni 100 inhlawhna MGNREGS thlaktu tur a nih thu a sawi a. MGNREGS kalpui mek laia tlin lohna leh that tawk lohna awmte tha zawka siam that nana duan a nih thu a tarlang. Project Director chuan he hmalakna thar hi hlawhtling taka kalpui a nih theih nan theih tawp chhuahpui turin line department aiawh kalkhawmte chu a ngen a ni.

Vawiina Orientation Workshop-ah hian Pu Vanlalpeka, Assistant Project Officer (APO) chuan PowerPoint presentation hmangin VB-G RAM G chungchang kalhmang tur hi chipchiar takin a sawifiah a, hemi hnu hian zawhna leh chhanna hun tangkai tak hman zui nghal a ni. He hunah hian Kolasib District huam chhunga line department hrang hrang atangin officer-te an tel tha hle a ni.

Attachment

title: 'STOP Diarrhoea Campaign 2026' kalpui dan tur chungchangah Saitual District Coordination Committee thukhawm
content:
926/2026-2027

Saitual, the 10th June, 2026: Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah Ministry of Health & Family Welfare hnuaia India ram pum huapa naupangte zinga kawthalo (diarrhoea) vanga thihna pumpelhna tura beihpui thlakna 'STOP Diarrhoea Campaign 2026' kalpui dan tur chungchangah Saitual District Coordination Committee an chairperson, District Bawrhsap ni bawk Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thukhawm.

He hunah hian Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Dy. CMO chuan powerpoint presentation hmangin STOP Diarrhoea Campaign chungchang a sawifiah a, a thil tum te, activity hrang hrang neih tur te leh line department mawhphurhna te a tarlang a ni.

STOP Diarrhoea Campaign thupui chu “ORS leh faina leh thianghlimna hmangin kawthalo lakah inveng rawh”- “Prevent Diarrhoea-Take care with Hygiene and ORS” tih a ni. SDC hi June ni 16 atanga July ni 31, 2026  thleng kalpui tur a ni a, he campaign chhung hian naupang kum 5 hnuai lamte hnenah a thlawnin ORS leh Zinc tablet te sem a ni dawn a ni. ASHA leh healthworker te chu hmun hrang hrangah kalin kawthalo ven dan leh enkawl dan te, kut sil dan te, ORS leh zinc pawimawhna te, faina chungchang zirtirna te an pe ang. Sub centre-ah te leh Anganwadi Centre-ah te ORS-Zinc corner siam a ni ang a, heng hmunah te hian naupang kawthalote chuan enkawlna an dawng thei dawn a ni.

Kumin STOP Diarrhoea Campaign hawnna (District Launching programme) hi June ni 16, 2026, chawhma dar 10:00 AM-ah Aganwadi Centre-VII, Saitualah neih tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah Voter Awareness Forum neih a ni
content:
924/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 10th of June, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit khawpui chhunga office hrang hrang atanga Nodal Officers a ruatte tan Special Intensive Revision chungchang zirhona neih a ni a, training hi Pu Suvigya S. Chandra, District Election Officer/District Bawrhsap chuan a hawng.

Pu Suvigya S Chandra chuan India khua leh tui vote nei thei chinte tana roll thar siam tura  hmalak mekah mipuite chu BLO te tawiawma,lo dawngsawng tha turin a chah a, vote thlak thei tura inziahluh chu khua leh tui kan nihna nemngehna leh document pawimawh tak a nih avangin ngaipawimawh turin a chah bawk.

Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, Election Officer chuan Special Intensive Revision kalpui meka form fill-up dan zirtirna a nei a, Voter Awareness Forum chu tuna kan kalpui mek SIR atan chuah pawh nilo, Office tina thawktute'n Election kaihhnawih hrim hrim kan hriat theih nana ruahman a nih thu a sawi a, kan thawhna theuhah kan thawhpuite hrilhhretu ni tura inbuatsaih turin a chah bawk.

Pu Ramropuia, UDC, DC Office chuan Online hmanga SIR form fill-up dan kalkhawmte zirtirna a lem nen a nei bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Mamit khawpui chhung Department hrang hranga officers te leh thawktute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP LEH CYLA OFFICE BEARERS- TE INKAWM
content:
923/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 10th June, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00AM khan Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai Office Chamber- ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga'n Central YLA Office Bearers- te kawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Central YLA Office Bearers- te hnena lawmthu a sawina a nei a. Ruihhlo do kalpui mekah committee- peng hrang hrangte awm mahse, CYLA- te nen kan hmalaknate kan in hriat pawh a tul hle a ni, a ti. Bawrhsap chuan ruihhlo mai bakah foreigners leh sumdawnna chungchangah pawh hmalakna tur tam tak a awm a, State Sawrkarah Preliminary SOP- te thehluh niin tun thla chhung hian approval hmuh beisei a nih thu a tarlang. CYLA, LWA, MHIP- te chu District Administration - hmalaknaah an pawimawh em em a, sawrkar kut ke tak tak an ni tih sawiin, thawhho zel a tul hle a ti a. Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai District chu ruihhlo laka a lo him a, lawng hrang hranga hma a sawn zel theih nana thawhpuiah a sawm nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian hmalakhona hrang hrangte ennawn a ni a. A bik takin Operation Jericho kalpui mekah DRS, CYLA nena thawhhona chu a fakawm hle tih pawm tlangin,tun dinhmunah Lawngtlaiah Chakma zu khawthlang lam atanga a lo lut tam ber in, Ruihhlo bik chu Lunglei leh Siaha lam atang lo lut a tam ber tih report ngaihthlak a ni a. Heng zu leh Ruihhlo do rem tur hian a lo luhna hriat a nih angin chak zawka hmalak ho ni se an ti a ni. CYLA - lam pawhin Ruihhlo do na atan a mamawh an neihte thlen in, Bawrhsap chuan a theih ang anga ngaihtuah a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Central YLA Office Bearers - te an tel kim tha hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm a khar.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER DISCUSSES SIR 2026 TOLL-FREE HELPLINE ISSUE WITH BSNL TELECOM SERVICE PROVIDERS
content:
155/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 10 June 2026:A meeting was held today at 10:00 AM between the District Election Officer (DEO), Lawngtlai, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, and representatives of BSNL, the telecom service provider, regarding issues related to the toll-free helpline being used for the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026.

During the meeting, the DEO stated that the toll-free helpline number 1950 is being used across the country for election-related services. However, difficulties have arisen in Lawngtlai District because both Lawngtlai and Siaha districts share the same STD code. As a result, calls made to the toll-free helpline are often not routed correctly, with some calls from Lawngtlai being directed to Siaha. He pointed out that this has caused inconvenience to both the public and the Election Office and requested BSNL officials to assist in resolving the issue.

The BSNL representatives acknowledged the problem and suggested that efforts be made to obtain a separate STD code for Lawngtlai District. They also recommended that the matter be formally communicated to the General Manager, BSNL, Aizawl, for necessary action.

The meeting concluded with a discussion on possible measures to ensure the smooth functioning of the election helpline service in the district.

Attachment

title: Nagaland Public Service Commission (State Civil & Other Services) Recruitment (11th Amendment) Rules, 2026
